summary: Crisp soundboard capture of an epic second‑set Dark Star marathon with stellar Slipknot! and Stella Blue moments
review: The recording is a clean, well‑separated soundboard that lets the 32‑minute Dark Star jam shine, followed by a soaring Let It Grow section, a fiery Slipknot! Jam and a beautifully rendered Stella Blue. Reviewers rave about the intensity of the later set and the rarity of Ship of Fools as an encore, making this a must‑have for any Deadhead collection.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong musical performance (standout Dark Star and second‑set flow) combined with a crisp soundboard recording yields a high overall rating despite limited number of detailed reviews.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp board with good instrument separation; clear and clean throughout, no major drop‑outs noted.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set solid (highlight on Wharf Rat), second set builds with a monumental Dark Star > Let It Grow > Slipknot! sequence, then mellower ballads and a rare Ship of Fools encore.
